containers.raw-unmasked: Controlled data-lab only. Original CSVs with sensitive identifiers; never used in staging and never stored in Git.
containers.raw-masked: Masked CSVs with identifiers hashed or tokenized for model development and controlled runs.
containers.input: Input datasets or masked samples used for controlled runs.
containers.curated: Cleaned features and normalized datasets produced from masked inputs.
containers.baseline: Historical baseline snapshots used for drift comparison.
containers.runs: Run-level metadata, summaries, and model_run_log records.
containers.artifacts: Small versioned artifacts generated by validation jobs.
